title: statechart set per decision
manager: The classic statechart features, landed as a coherent set per the umbrella decision: history pseudostates, final states with done-events, fork/join (parallel regions), in-state guards, internal transitions, deferred events, raise/send, and activities (do/invoke). This is FSL reaching feature-parity with UML and SCXML statecharts, done deliberately as one designed set rather than piecemeal, so the pieces compose cleanly instead of colliding when combined.
cs: history #1340, final #1341, fork/join #1342, in-state #1343, internal #1344, deferred #1347, raise/send #1346, activities #1351; the decided statechart set under umbrella #1353 (parallel regions stays open by decision).
